title.en: Ensure auditing for processes that start prior to auditd is enabled

prose.en: Ensure auditing for processes that start prior to auditd is enabled

description.en: Configure `grub2` so that processes that are capable of being audited can be audited even if they start up prior to `auditd` startup.

rationale.en: Audit events need to be captured on processes that start up prior to `auditd` , so that potential malicious activity cannot go undetected.

audit.en:
Edit `/etc/default/grub` and add `audit=1` to `GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX`:  

Example:  

Run the following command to update the `grub2` configuration:

```
# update-grub
```

```
GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="audit=1"
```

remediation.en:
Edit `/etc/default/grub` and add `audit=1` to `GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX`:  

Example:  

Run the following command to update the `grub2` configuration:

```
# update-grub
```

```
GRUB_CMDLINE_LINUX="audit=1"
```

references: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5: AU-2, AU-3, AU-12
